description_long: This is a large, double-headed battle axe with a dark, metallic finish and an imposing, fantasy-inspired design. The axe features two broad, curved blades on either side, each with pointed, wing-like extensions and a central spike at the top. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal with a textured, brown grip section near the base for secure handling. The overall construction is robust, with the head and handle seamlessly integrated, suggesting a single forged piece. The surface of the axe is matte black, giving it a menacing and utilitarian appearance. There are no visible engravings, markings, or decorative elements aside from the dramatic blade geometry.
description: A large, double-headed black battle axe with winged blades and a spiked top, featuring a long metal handle with a brown grip. The design is robust and fantasy-inspired, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-headed axe, with both curved blades and the central spike clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the axe, emphasizing the pointed spike and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the symmetrical blade design and central spike.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the length of the handle with the grip section.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical handle with a brown textured grip, likely leather-wrapped, and a polygonal pommel at the base.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, wide, curved blades with pointed wing-like extensions and a central upward spike; symmetrical and fantasy-inspired with no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, single-forged or integrated metal construction with no visible pins or wedges.
